# Hugo Daniel's Blog

> Personal blog about web development, WebGPU, creative coding, and design tools.

This is the personal website of Hugo Daniel, a Portuguese software developer making tools for creative code.

## Site Structure

- `/` - Homepage with author bio and recent posts
- `/posts/` - Blog articles about web development, WebGPU, shaders, and creative coding
- `/projects/` - Project showcases (e.g., Shader Canvas)
- `/pages/` - Interactive web applications and tools

## Main Topics

- WebGPU and WGSL shaders
- Web Components and JavaScript frameworks
- Creative coding and graphics programming
- Design tools (color pickers, pixel art generators)
- Browser technologies and performance

## Author

Hugo Daniel
- Email: hello@hugodaniel.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/HugoDaniel
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/hugodan.bsky.social
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrhugogomes/

## Projects

- **boreDOM** - A minimal JavaScript framework (no bundling, no compilation)
- **Grid Generator** - A design tool for pixel art and azulejo-inspired patterns
- **Color Picker Pro** - A Figma plugin for color selection
- **WebGPU Diagnostics** - A WebGPU info and shader compilation benchmark tool
- **Shader Canvas** - A graphics framework for creative coding

## Technical Details

- Static site built with Zola
- RSS/Atom feed available at /atom.xml
- Search index available for client-side search
- All content is in English

Content is published under EUPL 1.2 license.
